reviews.comment:
Aunque es un buen lugar y los playeros siempre son educados, últimamente (ya sea por problemas económicos o lo que sea) hay cada vez menos atendiendo lo que lo hace un poco tedioso ya que al ser una de las principales estaciones de servicio del centro la espera se vuelve muy larga. Para atenderte se tarda mucho. Por lo demás todo bien. Hay lo esencial para lo mínimo. Aunque no suele haber mecánicos últimamente

(Translated by Google)
Although it's a good place and the attendants are always polite, lately (whether due to financial problems or something else) there are fewer and fewer of them working, which makes it a bit tedious since, being one of the main gas stations downtown, the wait becomes very long. It takes a long time to get served. Otherwise, everything is fine. They have the essentials. Although there aren't usually any mechanics around lately.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6287190552049415730/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTbTVGUxAB

reviews.comment:
Antes iba por el café..ahora ya no tienen casi mercaderías.. está apagado.. vacío y cerrado la mayoría de las veces..una lastima

(Translated by Google)
I used to go there for the coffee... now they hardly have any merchandise... it's dark, empty, and closed most of the time... what a shame
